rows.label: tev011701_SEL0131
rows.name: Ask Giotto about strength training.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_SEL0141
rows.name: Ask Giotto about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_SEL0161
rows.name:
Ask Giotto if he's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Giotto about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0001
rows.name:
You that new [ST:gender p1=guy p2=gal ] everyone's talking about?
Pffft! You're a scrawny one, ain't ya?
Sure wouldn't want you watching my back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0002
rows.name:
Do you even lift? You gotta start
training those abs, pecs, and delts, [ST:gender p1=bro p2=babe ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0003
rows.name:
Leave the city looking like that, and you'll be in
some indigen's belly before the gate clangs shut
behind you. Not that you'd make much of a meal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you're planning on doing any serious
fighting, get your glutes down to Armory
Alley and buy yourself some proper gear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Huh? What about me? [ST:gender p1=Dude p2=Babe ], when
you're ripped like I am, gear
don't make one bit of difference.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0008
rows.name:
What do you think? Pretty
impressive, right? Go on, you
can touch 'em. Wanna see me flex?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0013
rows.name:
Did you know you could take the elevator on Union
Drive down to the lower level of the administrative
district? That's where the hangars are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0014
rows.name:
A bunch of punks usually hang out
in the shadows down there. They like
to pick fights with new BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm sure they'd love to have a go at
you, so watch your back, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0031
rows.name:
I saw some footage of the Bias
on FrontierNet. Looks like they
work out pretty regularly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0032
rows.name:
You seriously mix it up with
those guys? How'd it go? Are
they as tough as they look?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0033
rows.name:
Haw haw haw. Oh yeah, I believe it. They
look like some pretty tough customers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0034
rows.name:
But if they were to come after me and
my crew, we'd mop the floor with them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0037
rows.name:
These chiseled arms would make 'em regret the day
they decided to go up against the might of BLADE.
We're talking two tickets to the guns show, boom![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0040
rows.name:
So I was walking through that block at
the back of Union Drive. You know, the
one that's still under construction?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0041
rows.name:
And from behind a crane in the
back, I heard someone shouting
"I WILL become a BLADE!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0042
rows.name:
Well, I got kinda curious and decided
to take a look. Turns out it was some
mechanic chick doing all the shouting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0043
rows.name:
She just stood there staring at the
outer walls with this really intense
look on her face. Weird, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0052
rows.name:
Hear you lost your left
hand in a Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0053
rows.name:
That's the sort of thing that happens
when you don't commit to a rigorous
strength-training regimen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0054
rows.name:
...What? You're asking me if
strength-training even has an effect
on the artificial muscles of a Blue Blood?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0055
rows.name:
Well, sure, maybe it doesn't actually make them
any more PHYSICALLY powerful, but you FEEL like
you're getting stronger. Ain't that enough?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0056
rows.name:
Once you've honed your spirit and boosted
your willpower with a good training regimen,
you won't ever fear the Growth again[ST:gender p1=, dude! p2=! ][ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0059
rows.name:
There's an old warehouse at
the edge of the industrial
district that no one uses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0060
rows.name:
But it sounds like a bunch of tough-looking
xenoforms have taken over the place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0061
rows.name:
Are those Ma-non? I thought they were
all a bunch of little shrimps, but
maybe they've got a few big guys.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0070
rows.name:
Hey! I heard you were the one
who drove away that Riiz bird
and her bulky friend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0071
rows.name:
Man, when you first showed up
here, I thought you were just
another scrawny nobody.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0072
rows.name:
Never thought you'd toughen up
enough to beat monsters like them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0073
rows.name:
With strength like that, I'm proud to
have you working with me to guard this
city and chase down the Lifepoint![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0076
rows.name:
I heard that big guy and the chick
who led the attack on NLA have been
spotted in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0077
rows.name:
Sounds like BLADE command might
be putting together a pursuit
team to go after them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0078
rows.name:
If you aren't on some urgent mission already,
maybe you should go listen to what people
are saying out in front of BLADE HQ.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0079
rows.name:
I can't imagine anyone who's a better fit for the
job than the [ST:gender p1=dude p2=gal ] who drove 'em off in the first place.
I'm sure HQ would love to have you on board![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0088
rows.name:
I watched your fight with that Zu Pharg
thing over FrontierNet. Impressive work![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0089
rows.name:
That thing was huge, but you were batting it around
like a cat with a ball of twine. Man, was I cheering
when you sent it crashing down upon White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0090
rows.name:
It REALLY got everyone's blood
pumping to watch you kick some
serious Growth glutes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0091
rows.name:
That's the spirit, [ST:gender p1=dude p2=babe ]! It's time we went on
offense and brought that kind of glute-kicking
right to the Growth's doorstep![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0094
rows.name:
So I rode the elevator down to the hangars
to check on my Doll earlier, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0095
rows.name:
But then this guy—apparently
some sort of BLADE— came up and
wrapped his arms around me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0096
rows.name:
I thought he was gonna choke me or something,
but instead he called me "Muscles" and asked
me to help him out with a recovery mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0097
rows.name:
I dunno, man. Seems like a pretty weird
way to go about asking for help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0098
rows.name:
Anyway, maybe keep an eye out if you
have any business down there. ...Unless
you like surprise hugs from strangers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0106
rows.name:
So the decisive battle is finally
here, huh? It's weird, man...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0107
rows.name:
In some ways, it feels like it was only yesterday that
those bastards wrecked the Earth and sent us fleeing.
But in another way, it feels like forever ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0108
rows.name:
You know I'll be right behind you, supporting
you with everything I got. You just gotta
bring home one last victory for us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0109
rows.name:
And I mean that[ST:gender p1=, dude. p2=. ] You're the ace of the
whole BLADE deck, and everyone knows it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0110
rows.name: Now get out there and finish the job![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0113
rows.name:
Did you know that there's a
Companion assigned to the Nopon
Caravan in Valley of Oblivion?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0114
rows.name:
Man, that's a tough region, and he's all by
himself. Even worse, I hear the Nopon are
forcing him to do all sorts of ridiculous jobs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0115
rows.name:
You get out to that place from time to time,
yeah? Next time you're in the neighborhood, how
about you swing by and talk to the poor guy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0119
rows.name:
I'm sure he'd be thrilled to have
a human to talk to for once![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0120
rows.name:
You know Kent? That puny little Blue Blood
tech? He claims that none of my strength-training
is doing a damn thing to build muscles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0121
rows.name:
He told me the only muscle I got
that needs training is my brain![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0122
rows.name:
I can't wait till we get our real bodies back.
Then I'll give y'all a lesson in bodybuilding
that no one will be able to laugh off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0123
rows.name:
Abs, pecs, and delts, baby! I'll work your
midsections so hard you'll be too sore to eat
for days. But goddamn will I make you look great![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0124
rows.name:
And when Kent gets a load of my
six-pack, we'll see who's mocking who![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0125
rows.name:
There sure are a lot of xenoforms with
great muscle tone. I mean, just look
how ripped the Larsians and Bias are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0126
rows.name:
One of these days, I'd like to give
'em both a good chest-bump and see
whose pecs comes out on top.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0127
rows.name:
You know, I don't think we have a place where
we can get together and peacefully test our
strength against each other like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0128
rows.name:
Hell, you've gotten pretty tough
yourself! I sure wouldn't mind
putting your muscles to the test.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0129
rows.name:
I heard the Larsians are opening a
combat arena near the Arms test hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0130
rows.name:
If you got a little time off,
why not come try it out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0131
rows.name:
You should give those Larsians a look
at the muscles that knocked the
Growth's finest right the hell out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0132
rows.name:
Hey! I hear you entered the
Larsian Battle Gauntlet and
completely dominated the thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0133
rows.name:
You mind if I squeeze the best
muscles in the universe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0134
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0135
rows.name:
Ooooooh yeaaaaaah! Those are killer, bro!
I can feel the expansion of the universe
pulsating through your mighty biceps![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0136
rows.name:
I gotta up my training game so I can
build galaxy-class muscles like yours![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0137
rows.name:
Hey! I hear you entered the
Larsian Battle Gauntlet and
completely dominated the thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0138
rows.name:
It's incredible that you were
able to beat those Larsians,
considering their superhuman pecs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0139
rows.name:
They must lift every day to get physiques like that.
Just training, training, and more training. Probably
hit the kettlebells, too. Talk about a WOD![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0140
rows.name:
...You know, I'm always kind of
uncomfortable around the ladies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0141
rows.name:
But with a super ripped lady like you, I feel like
I can talk normally! We'll have to get together
and trade workout secrets one of these days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0116
rows.name:
There's only one way to heal the pain of
being betrayed by someone you care about,
and that's a rigorous lifting session.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0117
rows.name:
Our muscles won't ever let us down.
So let's reward our mimeo-muscles
by working them till we puke![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011701_MSG0118
rows.name:
Awww yeah! I can't WAIT
to be sore tomorrow![ST:wait ]
